name.description: Unique artifact name within the repository.

type.description: Whether this artifact produces an executable or a library.

dependencies.description: Artifacts this one depends on, resolved by name through the repository.

name.description: Name of the dependency artifact as declared in the repository.

sources.description: One or more source groups that describe the files belonging to this artifact.

public_include_directories.description: Directories exposed to dependents as include search paths. Relative paths are resolved from the artifact file location.

executable.description: Entry-point configuration. Required when type is "executable".

source.description: Path to the Iris source file that contains the entry point, relative to the artifact file.

entry_point.description: Mangled or qualified name of the entry-point function.

library.description: Library-specific configuration. Used when type is "library".

external_libraries.description: Maps platform target keys (e.g. "windows-dynamic-debug") to arrays of native library names to link.

copy.description: Files or directories to copy into the build directory. Source paths are relative to the artifact file location; destination paths are relative to the build directory.

source.description: Path to a source file or directory to copy. Relative paths are resolved from the artifact file location.

destination.description: Destination path in the build directory. Relative paths are resolved from the build directory root.

include.description: Glob patterns selecting which files belong to this source group. Relative to the artifact file location.

additional_flags.description: Extra compiler flags passed when processing files in this source group.

output_directory.description: Directory where generated C headers are written. Relative to the artifact file location.

headers.description: C headers to import as Iris modules.

name.description: Iris module name for the imported header (e.g. "c.stdio").

header.description: Header filename to locate in the search paths (e.g. "stdio.h").

dependencies.description: Other imported header module names this header depends on.

allow_errors.description: When true, parsing errors in this header are non-fatal.

search_paths.description: Directories in which to search for the listed header files.

public_prefixes.description: Symbol prefixes that are considered part of the public API.

remove_prefixes.description: Symbol prefixes to strip when generating Iris identifiers.
